---
title: "Teaching & CV"
toc: true
toc-title: "Jump to"
---

<span class="section-label">Teaching & Background</span>
<div class="rule-accent"></div>

## Teaching Philosophy

My primary objective in teaching is to help students enhance their ability to learn, solve problems, and add value with confidence. I teach the following courses: Ranch Management Economics Capstone, Introduction to Futures and Options, and graduate-level Production Economics.

---

## Curriculum Vitae

::: {.row .g-5}

::: {.col-md-6}

### Education

<div class="cv-row"><div class="cv-year">2023</div><div><div class="cv-title">Ph.D., Agricultural Economics</div><div class="cv-place">Kansas State University</div></div></div>
<div class="cv-row"><div class="cv-year">2019</div><div><div class="cv-title">M.S., Agricultural Economics</div><div class="cv-place">Purdue University</div></div></div>
<div class="cv-row"><div class="cv-year">2017</div><div><div class="cv-title">B.S., Agricultural Business</div><div class="cv-place">Brigham Young University - Idaho</div></div></div>

### Positions

<div class="cv-row"><div class="cv-year">2026–</div><div><div class="cv-title">Assistant Professor & Extension Specialist</div><div class="cv-place">Utah State University</div></div></div>
<div class="cv-row"><div class="cv-year">2023–25</div><div><div class="cv-title">Assistant Professor</div><div class="cv-place">University of Arkansas</div></div></div>

:::

:::

::: {.text-center .mt-4}
[Download Full CV (PDF)](cv.pdf){.btn-sage}
:::
